title: calandrinia crenata
intro: Calandrinia crenata, also known as pink purslane, is a flowering plant species native to the western coast of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in reducing swelling and fighting off infections. The health benefits of Calandrinia crenata include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and sore throats, as well as its use as a digestive aid to soothe upset stomachs. Herbal preparations of Calandrinia crenata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
